title: Dooney Bourke Women's Bag
description: The Dooney Bourke Women's Bag is a stylish and practical shoulder bag in a classic rectangular shape. Made of pebbled black leather with gold-plated hardware, this medium-sized bag features a zip closure and brown leather shoulder strap. The interior is equipped with inner pockets for organization, making it perfect for everyday use. Additionally, this designer bag includes a bag charm and is adorned with pebbles, adding a unique touch to the solid black exterior. Made in the United States, this bag exudes quality craftsmanship and timeless style.
